mapper.select:
SELECT agg.record_id AS recordId, agg.user_id AS userId, agg.result_type AS resultType, agg.source_type AS sourceType, agg.source_table AS sourceTable, agg.source_result_id AS sourceResultId, agg.source_session_id AS sourceSessionId, agg.display_title AS displayTitle, agg.summary AS summary, agg.status AS status, agg.detail_ref AS detailRef, agg.source_time AS sourceTime, agg.favorite AS favorite, agg.favorite_time AS favoriteTime FROM (
) agg WHERE agg.user_id = #{userId} AND agg.source_table = #{sourceTable} AND agg.source_result_id = #{sourceResultId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO xm_learning_record ( user_id, result_type, display_title, source_type, source_table, source_session_id, source_result_id, source_time, status, analysis_summary, detail_ref, deleted_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{record.userId}, #{record.resultType}, #{record.displayTitle}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.sourceTable},
COALESCE(#{record.sourceSessionId}, #{record.sourceResultId}), #{record.sourceResultId}, #{record.sourceTime}, #{record.status}, #{record.summary}, #{record.detailRef}, '1', NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE display_title = VALUES(display_title), source_type = VALUES(source_type), source_session_id = COALESCE(VALUES(source_session_id), source_session_id), source_time = VALUES(source_time), status = VALUES(status), analysis_summary = VALUES(analysis_summary), detail_ref = VALUES(detail_ref), deleted_flag = '1', update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO xm_learning_favorite ( user_id, result_type, source_table, source_result_id, source_session_id, detail_ref, active_flag, favorite_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{record.userId}, #{record.resultType}, #{record.sourceTable}, #{record.sourceResultId}, #{record.sourceSessionId}, #{record.detailRef}, '1', NOW(), NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE result_type = VALUES(result_type), source_session_id = VALUES(source_session_id), detail_ref = VALUES(detail_ref), active_flag = '1', cancel_time = NULL, favorite_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW()
